# source: https://github.com/vibrantlabsai/ragas/issues/1149
# repo: vibrantlabsai/ragas
# title: 【HELP!!  TimeoutError，seems that can not connect to the api server】
# 
# ragas version 0.1.12
# **Describe the bug**
# I try to run the demo with my openai key, which i have test my key is valid and i can get the correct response via:
# curl https://api.gptsapi.net/v1/models \-H "Authorization: Bearer sk-WBR2fc39b876ab1..“ 
# However, when i run the demo, it can not work well, and output was like:
# Ragas version: 0.1.12
# Python version: 3.10
# **Code to Reproduce**
# **Additional context**
# can anybody give my some useful advise, thank u sooo much!!
# <!-- PS: bugs suck but is also part of the process. We sincerely apologies for breaking your flow because of it, but don't worry, we got your back ❤️. We will get this fixed as fast as we can and thanks for helping us out by reporting it 🙏. -->

Ragas version: 0.1.12
Python version: 3.10

**Code to Reproduce**
